response.content:
Here are the results — I searched HN for both "IronClaw" and "NEAR AI" mentions.

## Hacker News posts mentioning **IronClaw**

| Post | URL |
|------|-----|
| **IronClaw: a Rust-based clawd that runs tools in isolated WASM sandboxes** — The main launch/Show HN thread | [item?id=47004312](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47004312) |
| **Has anyone used: OpenClaw NanoClaw IronClaw PicoClaw ZeroClaw NullClaw...** — Discussion comparing the various "claw" tools | [item?id=47195676](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47195676) |
| **vibe coded eh github.com/nearai/ironclaw** — A passing comment linking to the repo | [item?id=47005839](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47005839) |
| **I mean it is described somewhat succinctly no? Potentially untrusted tools are i...** — Comment thread on the IronClaw launch | [item?id=47007981](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47007981) |
| **the power of openclaw is theres no sand boxing** — Related discussion mentioning IronClaw | [item?id=47007250](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47007250) |

## Hacker News posts mentioning **NEAR AI**

No HN posts specifically mentioning "NEAR AI" by name were found in the search results.

---

**Summary:** The main HN discussion is the IronClaw Show HN launch (**item 47004312**), which generated a fair number of comment threads. There's also a more recent "claw ecosystem" comparison thread (**item 47195676**). For "NEAR AI", it appears the term is used more in GitHub repo descriptions and articles than in HN post titles — the HN activity is centered around the IronClaw project itself.
